Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.codebase.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Event extends Object implements Serializable
Domain model representing a lottery event in the Timely system.

An event progresses through several lifecycle stages driven by its date fields (registrationOpen, registrationDeadline, drawDate, startDate, endDate) and the state of its four entrant lists: waitingList, selectedEntrants, enrolledEntrants, and cancelledEntrants.

The class implements Serializable so that instances can be passed between Android components via

invalid reference 
android.os.Bundle
or
invalid reference 
android.content.Intent
extras.

Note on ID fields: id and eventId are kept in sync — setting either via setId(String) or setEventId(String) updates both.

See Also:

    Description
    ArrayList<String>
    getCancelledEntrants()
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who declined or were cancelled.

    getDescription()
    Returns the event description.
    Date
    getDrawDate()
    Returns the date and time of the lottery draw.
    Date
    getEndDate()
    Returns the event end date and time.
    ArrayList<String>
    getEnrolledEntrants()
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who accepted their invitation.
    String
    getEventId()
    Returns the secondary event ID field.
    String
    getId()
    Returns the primary Firestore document ID.
    String
    getLocation()
    Returns the event location.
    Long

    Returns the maximum enrolment capacity for this event.
    String

    Returns the device ID of the organizer who created this event.

    getPoster()
    Returns the event poster object containing the Base64-encoded image.
    String
    getPosterUrl()
    Returns the URL of the remotely hosted poster image.
    float
    getPrice()
    Returns the participation fee for the event.
    Date

    Returns the registration deadline after which no new entrants may join.
    Date
    getRegistrationOpen()
    Returns the date from which entrants may join the waiting list.
    ArrayList<String>
    getSelectedEntrants()
    Returns the list of device IDs for lottery-selected entrants awaiting response.
    Date
    getStartDate()
    Returns the event start date and time.
    String
    getStatus()
    Returns the raw Firestore status string for this event.
    String
    getTitle()
    Returns the event title.
    ArrayList<String>
    getWaitingList()
    Returns the list of device IDs for entrants on the waiting list.
    int
    getWaitlistCap()
    Returns the maximum number of entrants permitted on the waiting list.
    Long
    getWinnersCount()
    Returns the number of entrants to select during the lottery draw.
    boolean
    isGeoEnabled()
    Returns whether geolocation verification is enabled for this event.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()

  • Method Details

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the secondary event ID field.
      Returns:
      The Firestore document ID stored in eventId.

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the secondary event ID and synchronises id to the same value.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The Firestore document ID to assign.

    • isGeoEnabled

      public boolean isGeoEnabled()
      Returns whether geolocation verification is enabled for this event.
      Returns:
      true if entrants must provide their location when registering.

    • setGeoEnabled

      public void setGeoEnabled(boolean geoEnabled)
      Sets whether geolocation verification is required for this event.
      Parameters:
      geoEnabled - true to require location verification on registration.

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the raw Firestore status string for this event.
      Returns:
      The status string (e.g. "active"), or null if not set.

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the raw Firestore status string for this event.
      Parameters:
      status - The status value to store.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the primary Firestore document ID.
      Returns:
      The event's document ID, or null if not yet assigned.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the primary event ID and synchronises eventId to the same value.
      Parameters:
      id - The Firestore document ID to assign.

    • getOrganizerDeviceId

      public String getOrganizerDeviceId()
      Returns the device ID of the organizer who created this event.
      Returns:
      The organizer's device ID, or null if not set.

    • setOrganizerDeviceId

      public void setOrganizerDeviceId(String organizerDeviceId)
      Sets the device ID of the event's organizer.
      Parameters:
      organizerDeviceId - The organizer's device ID.

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Returns the event location.
      Returns:
      The location string, or null if not set.

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Sets the event location.
      Parameters:
      location - A physical address or descriptive venue name.

    • getDrawDate

      public Date getDrawDate()
      Returns the date and time of the lottery draw.
      Returns:
      The draw date, or null if not yet scheduled.

    • setDrawDate

      public void setDrawDate(Date drawDate)
      Sets the date and time of the lottery draw.
      Parameters:
      drawDate - The draw date to assign.

    • getPosterUrl

      public String getPosterUrl()
      Returns the URL of the remotely hosted poster image.
      Returns:
      The poster URL, or null if not set.

    • setPosterUrl

      public void setPosterUrl(String posterUrl)
      Sets the URL of the remotely hosted poster image.
      Parameters:
      posterUrl - The poster URL to assign.

    • getMaxCapacity

      public Long getMaxCapacity()
      Returns the maximum enrolment capacity for this event.
      Returns:
      The cap as a Long, or null if uncapped.

    • setMaxCapacity

      public void setMaxCapacity(Long maxCapacity)
      Sets the maximum enrolment capacity for this event.
      Parameters:
      maxCapacity - The capacity cap, or null for no limit.

    • getWinnersCount

      public Long getWinnersCount()
      Returns the number of entrants to select during the lottery draw.
      Returns:
      The winner count as a Long, or null to select all.

    • setWinnersCount

      public void setWinnersCount(Long winnersCount)
      Sets the number of entrants to select during the lottery draw.
      Parameters:
      winnersCount - The winner count, or null to select all waiting-list entrants.

    • getWaitingList

      public ArrayList<String> getWaitingList()
      Returns the list of device IDs for entrants on the waiting list.
      Returns:
      A non-null ArrayList of device ID strings.

    • setWaitingList

      public void setWaitingList(ArrayList<String> waitingList)
      Replaces the waiting-list entrant collection.
      Parameters:
      waitingList - The new list of device IDs.

    • getSelectedEntrants

      public ArrayList<String> getSelectedEntrants()
      Returns the list of device IDs for lottery-selected entrants awaiting response.
      Returns:
      A non-null ArrayList of device ID strings.

    • setSelectedEntrants

      public void setSelectedEntrants(ArrayList<String> selectedEntrants)
      Replaces the selected-entrants collection.
      Parameters:
      selectedEntrants - The new list of device IDs.

    • getEnrolledEntrants

      public ArrayList<String> getEnrolledEntrants()
      Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who accepted their invitation.
      Returns:
      A non-null ArrayList of device ID strings.

    • setEnrolledEntrants

      public void setEnrolledEntrants(ArrayList<String> enrolledEntrants)
      Replaces the enrolled-entrants collection.
      Parameters:
      enrolledEntrants - The new list of device IDs.

    • getCancelledEntrants

      public ArrayList<String> getCancelledEntrants()
      Returns the list of device IDs for entrants who declined or were cancelled.
      Returns:
      A non-null ArrayList of device ID strings.

    • setCancelledEntrants

      public void setCancelledEntrants(ArrayList<String> cancelledEntrants)
      Replaces the cancelled-entrants collection.
      Parameters:
      cancelledEntrants - The new list of device IDs.

    • getPoster

      public EventPoster getPoster()
      Returns the event poster object containing the Base64-encoded image.
      Returns:
      The EventPoster, or null if no poster has been set.

    • setPoster

      public void setPoster(EventPoster poster)
      Sets the event poster.
      Parameters:
      poster - The EventPoster to assign.

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the event title.
      Returns:
      The title string, or null if not set.

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the event title.
      Parameters:
      title - The human-readable event title.

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the event description.
      Returns:
      The description string, or null if not set.

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)
      Sets the event description.
      Parameters:
      description - The detailed event description.

    • getStartDate

      public Date getStartDate()
      Returns the event start date and time.
      Returns:
      The start Date, or null if not set.

    • setStartDate

      public void setStartDate(Date startDate)
      Sets the event start date and time.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The start Date to assign.

    • getEndDate

      public Date getEndDate()
      Returns the event end date and time.
      Returns:
      The end Date, or null if not set.

    • setEndDate

      public void setEndDate(Date endDate)
      Sets the event end date and time.
      Parameters:
      endDate - The end Date to assign.

    • getRegistrationOpen

      public Date getRegistrationOpen()
      Returns the date from which entrants may join the waiting list.
      Returns:
      The registration open Date, or null if not set.

    • setRegistrationOpen

      public void setRegistrationOpen(Date registrationOpen)
      Sets the date from which entrants may join the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      registrationOpen - The registration open Date to assign.

    • getRegistrationDeadline

      public Date getRegistrationDeadline()
      Returns the registration deadline after which no new entrants may join.
      Returns:
      The deadline Date, or null if not set.

    • setRegistrationDeadline

      public void setRegistrationDeadline(Date registrationDeadline)
      Sets the registration deadline.
      Parameters:
      registrationDeadline - The deadline Date to assign.

    • getWaitlistCap

      public int getWaitlistCap()
      Returns the maximum number of entrants permitted on the waiting list.
      Returns:
      The cap as a non-negative int; 0 means no cap.

    • setWaitlistCap

      public void setWaitlistCap(int waitlistCap)
      Sets the maximum number of entrants permitted on the waiting list.
      Parameters:
      waitlistCap - A non-negative integer; 0 indicates no cap.

    • getPrice

      public float getPrice()
      Returns the participation fee for the event.
      Returns:
      The price as a float; 0.0 indicates a free event.

    • setPrice

      public void setPrice(float price)
      Sets the participation fee for the event.
      Parameters:
      price - A non-negative value; use 0.0 for a free event.
